response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and frameworks, with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and demonstrated expertise in scalable systems, testing, and AI-agent infrastructure. His roles show consistent leadership in architecture, performance optimization, and cross-functional collaboration, matching the seniority and technical depth required.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong architecture and performance optimization skills with measurable impact
concerns: No direct experience with Vitest (testing requirement)
Recent role change (re:cinq) may require verification of current availability or fit
